category_sources: source_facts.description says GTK-Doc is a GTK+ documentation tool; official GNOME Wiki Archive describes GtkDoc as a tool used to extract API documentation from C code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gtk-doc; official GNOME Wiki Archive page is DocumentationProject/GtkDoc.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Wiki Archive page contains GtkDoc documentation and points to the manual in the official gtk-doc source tree.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME GitLab source-control project URL for gtk-doc.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says GTK+ documentation tool; official GNOME Wiki Archive explains GtkDoc extracts API documentation from C code and is suitable for GTK+/GNOME libraries.
